arts.sum: Manchester United are ready to revamp their midfield in the summer and they have already identified their targets. arts.ttl: Report: Man United eyeing move for 24-year-old England international
arts.sum: Manchester United are expected to enter the market to sign a new defender in the summer transfer window. The Red Devils invested heavily in their defense last summer when they signed Leny Yoro, Matthijs de Ligt and Noussair Mazraoui. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim must change his approach with Manchester United strikers before it's too late
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wanted a new striker in January but the Man Utd head coach now has to instill confidence in the player he wants to back.

arts.ttl: Talks held: Arsenal, Man Utd & Liverpool indicate plan to bid for €60m star following contacts
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Liverpool are showing a strong interest in the potential transfer of Eintracht Frankfurt wonderkid Hugo Larsson ahead of the summer. The highly-rated 20-year-old has shone in the Bundesliga, and a host of top European clubs are now emerging as suitors for him.
